document_summary: This exhibit contains a photograph from the Data Awards ceremony. The image-only document (page 2) shows the award ceremony scene, serving as visual corroboration that the Data Awards 2019 event took place and that awards were presented at an official ceremony.

snippets.subject: Data Awards ceremony
snippets.reasoning: Photograph of the Data Awards ceremony, providing visual evidence that the award event was a formal, organized ceremony.
